description_long: This is a large, multi-section log cabin with a complex, multi-gabled roof structure and extensive use of natural wood materials. The main building features prominent overhanging eaves, exposed log beams, and a spacious covered porch area, giving it a rustic yet grand appearance. Multiple wings and attached structures, including a detached garage or pavilion, are visible, all sharing the same dark shingled roofing and log construction. The windows are symmetrically arranged, with several grouped sets of rectangular panes, and the main entrance is marked by a wide set of double doors beneath a deep overhang. The cabin sits on a raised stone or concrete foundation, surrounded by manicured grass and paved walkways. The overall design suggests a luxurious, lodge-style residence suitable for upscale suburban or park-like urban settings.
description: A large, rustic log cabin with a multi-gabled roof, wide porches, and symmetrical window groupings, set on a landscaped plot with paved paths and a detached pavilion.
description_view_0: This view shows the rear and side of the cabin, highlighting the attached garage or pavilion and the extensive roof overhangs.
description_view_1: This view presents the side and partial front, revealing the main porch area, symmetrical window groupings, and the connection between the main building and the pavilion.
description_view_2: This is the front view, showcasing the main double-door entrance, wide porch, and the balanced arrangement of windows and rooflines.
description_view_3: This view displays the opposite side, with a clear look at the secondary entrance, additional porch space, and the detached structure.
attribute_roof_type: multi-gabled roof with deep overhangs, covered in dark asphalt shingles, featuring exposed log beams and dormer-like projections
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple medium-sized rectangular windows arranged symmetrically in grouped sets on the front and sides, with some single windows on secondary structures; all windows have a consistent grid pattern
attribute_door_placement: main double doors centered on the front facade beneath the porch, with additional single doors on the side and rear sections, and a large garage or pavilion entrance on the left side
